◎简　　介  

　　Presented by Team Coco, James Veitch's comedy special explores technology, retro gaming, and finding love through troubleshooting theory. What can you say about James Veitch? He just doesn't like the tedium in life. So, forgive him for adding a little magic to the world, whether it be responding to an email about swimming pool plans meant for another pair of Veitches, refilling...
